zh.'s-Hertogenbosch, North Brabant, Netherl: 荷蘭努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯
zh.'s-Hertogenbosch, Den Bosch, Noord-Braba: 荷蘭努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel於大約1334年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯時，他的父親Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht26歲，母親Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen21歲。他於大約1378年與Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1426年在他的家鄉享年93歲。

zh-hans.'s-Hertogenbosch, North Brabant, Netherl: 荷兰努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel于大约1334年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特也-黑達歐根包斯时，他的父亲Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht26岁，母亲Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen21岁。他于大约1378年与Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1426年在他的家乡享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel was born about 1334, in 's-Hertogenbosch, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, was 26 and his mother, Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen, was 21. He married Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts about 1378. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1426, in his hometown, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel est né environ 1334, à 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts environ 1378. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1426, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel um 1334 in 's-Hertogenbosch, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht 26 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen 21. Er hat um 1378 Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1426 im Alter von 93 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel è nato il circa 1334 nel 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts circa 1378. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1426, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.Lith, North Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントリス
ja.'s-Hertogenbosch, Den Bosch, Noord-Braba: オランダノオルド-ブラバント'ス-ハートジェンボッシュ
ja.lifeSummary: Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Drielが約1334年にオランダノオルド-ブラバント'ス-ハートジェンボッシュで生まれた時，父Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrechtは26歳，母Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogenは21歳であった。約1378年にElisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthoutsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1426年に故郷で93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel(이)가 대략 1334년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 '스-헤르토겐보슈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1378년 Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1426년 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Lith, North Brabant, Netherlands: Lith, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts aproximadamente 1378. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1426, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel родился около 1334 г. в местности 'с-хиртодженбощ, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts около 1378 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1426 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет.

es.Lith, North Brabant, Netherlands: Lith, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Heimerik Jan van Dordrecht van Driel nació aproximadamente 1334, en 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Heimerik Jan Heimerik van Dordrecht, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Dirk Wouter van Beugen Beughem Boeghen Bogen Beughem Boeghen Bogen, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Jan Arnoud Bac van Tilborch Berthouts aproximadamente 1378. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1426, en su pueblo, a la edad de 93 años.
